subcodes.first_line: In this day must they who drink from the wine of inner meanings be, at all times, turned towards the horizon of the All-Merciful, and with utmost steadfastness [3.5s]... ...I swear by Him Who is the Most Great Ocean!  Within the very breath of such souls as are pure and sanctified far-reaching potentialities are hidden
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز باید شاربان رحیق معانی در کل احیان بافق رحمن ناظر باشند و بکمال استقامت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the power of words; of speech, @high station of the true believer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause
